title: 12 Pcs CV CV Joint Boot Clamps, 25-50mm and 50-120mm Drive Shaft Boot Clamps Hose Clamps Stainless Steel Clamping Clamp for Drive Shafts Waterproof Rustproof Durable
features: [Size High-quality material]: This 12 pcs contains adhesive axle boots in two sizes: 25–50 mm and 50–120 mm. Made of robust, rust-resistant stainless steel for long-lasting use
[Universal Application]: Our CV joint clamps are ideal for cars, motorcycles, boats, and ATVs, reliably protecting drive shafts, cables, and hoses in all mechanical projects.
[Easy Installation]: The flexible band clamp allows for quick and secure fixing of hoses and boots without special tools, ensuring a precise hold during repairs and maintenance.
[Secure Fixation]: The clamp provides a firm fit on drive shafts, cables, or air ducts, is easy to adjust, and guarantees lasting stability even under vibration and stress.

[Versatile Use]: Ideal for industrial applications or DIY projects, these stainless steel hose clamps and other clamps offer secure fastening for hoses, cables, pipes, and sand filters, making them practical for workshop or home use.
description: Product Information: This set contains 12 CV joint boot clamps, including 6 small (25–50 mm) and 6 large (50–120 mm). Made of high-quality stainless steel, they are rustproof, waterproof, and durable. The clamps are ideal for securing drive shafts, cables, hoses, and other mechanical components. Perfect for cars, motorcycles, ATVs, boats, and industrial applications. Features: 1. Robust and durable adhesive CV joint boot construction ensures a secure hold under vibration and continuous stress, reliably protecting CV boots and hoses. 2. Stainless steel hose clamps resist corrosion, rust, and high temperatures, making them ideal for use in cars, motorcycles, boats, and mechanical equipment. Specification: Material: Stainless Steel Color: Silver Quantity: 12 Pieces Size: As shown in the picture Package Contents: 12-Piece CV Joint Boot Clamp Set
